mdRecord.dcterms:title: "Tonight at 8:30" [by] Noel Coward
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Production poster for Three One-Act Comedies, Tonight at 8:30. Directed by Margaret Perry and Robert Porterfield. Featuring George Abel, Michael Chase, Martha Orrick, Peter Pagan, Margaret Perry, Gaby Rodgers, Mell Turner, and Elizabeth Wilson.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
mdRecord.dcterms:spatial: Abingdon, Washington county, Virginia, United States
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
